title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: Cursor published a case study on PayPal's use of AI to accelerate development. PayPal's high-adoption teams deploy daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster, with projections of 40% more capabilities in 2026.
